name: email-triage
description: Automated Gmail inbox triage with configurable categories, priority detection, iterative training, and summary delivery via Slack or chat.
author: agent-index

external_dependencies.access_required: Gmail search and read access (gmail_search, gmail_get_message, gmail_get_thread)
Google Cloud OAuth2 credentials.json with gmail.modify scope, provided by org admin at collection install time. Members authorize their own accounts against it during member setup.
Slack message sending (slack_send_message). Only required if delivery_method is 'slack'.
